---
title: "GLEAM function categories"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM function categories}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## 1) Input and data extraction

- `score_signature()`
- `seurat_mode()`
- `extract_embedding()`

## 2) Geneset management

- `get_geneset()`
- `list_geneset_sources()`
- `search_geneset()`
- `as_geneset()`
- `read_gmt()`
- `check_geneset()`
- `match_geneset()`

## 3) Scoring

- `score_signature()`
- `list_scoring_methods()`
- `compare_scoring_methods()`
- `run_gleam()`

## 4) Differential analysis

- `test_signature()`
- `test_signature_spatial()`
- `test_signature_trajectory()`

## 5) Trajectory analysis

- `extract_pseudotime()`
- `extract_lineage()`
- `as_trajectory_data()`
- `join_score_trajectory()`
- `map_scores_to_trajectory()`
- `plot_pseudotime_score()`
- `plot_trajectory_score()`

## 6) Spatial analysis

- `join_score_spatial()`
- `plot_spatial_score()`
- `plot_spatial_compare()`
- `plot_spatial_multi()`

## 7) Visualization

- `gleam_theme()`
- `plot_dot()`, `plot_dot_bar()`
- `plot_violin()`, `plot_split_violin()`, `plot_ridge()`
- `plot_box()`, `plot_pseudobulk_box()`
- `plot_embedding_score()`, `plot_heatmap()`, `plot_volcano()`
- `plot_celltype_compare()`, `plot_group_in_celltype()`

## 8) Export and comparison utilities

- `collect_scores()`
- `summarize_scores()`
- `pivot_scores_long()`
- `export_scores()`
- `compare_scoring_methods()`
